description: Community twin of android-app-agp: a single-module AGP app. The qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 (the compile SDK). A Qodana scan is an IDE model import + inspections (not a build), so THIS fixture's scan needs no build-tools/aapt2. Validates qodana-android-community end to end: build + bootstrap + AGP import + analysis producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on. The scan reliably flags an unstable Gradle/AGP DSL API in settings.gradle.kts as UnstableApiUsage. driver is QDJVM (the Community dist reports the Pro product code; qodana-android-community reuses the qodana-jvm-community dist). Deeper AndroidLint app-code assertions are QD-11439.

expectations.reason: qodana-android-community analyzes the project's Kotlin build script and flags an unstable Gradle/AGP DSL API in settings.gradle.kts as UnstableApiUsage. Confirmed from the QD-15247 CI control run (PR #108: 4x on settings.gradle.kts, driver QDJVM — the Community dist reports the Pro code — on both amd64 and arm64). AndroidLint app-code depth is QD-11439.
